import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Router } from '@angular/router'; @Component({ selector: 'app-layout', templateUrl: './layout.component.html' }) export class LayoutComponent { constructor(private router: Router) {} isActive(route: string): boolean { return this.router.isActive(route, { paths: 'exact', queryParams: 'exact', fragment: 'ignored', matrixParams: 'ignored' }); } scrollToTop() { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }); } }
